text:
Mohak Nahta, an Indian-origin CEO, kept his word to offer free visas to all Indians even though Neeraj Chopra won a silver medal at the Paris Olympics. Announcing on LinkedIn, Nahta celebrated the country's achievement, emphasizing spirit over medal color. His action received widespread praise for honoring promises and corporate responsibility.

description: Mohak Nahta, an Indian-origin CEO, kept his word to offer free visas to all Indians even though Neeraj Chopra won a silver medal at the Paris Olympics. Announcing on LinkedIn, Nahta celebrated the country's achievement, emphasizing spirit over medal color. His action received widespread praise for honoring promises and corporate responsibility.
